untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) calculation of 'average daily range' which is not a directly available indicator—ATR_14 is used as a proxy but the exact lookback period is marked AUTHOR_SILENT; (2) time-based entry condition 'after first hour of trading' cannot be expressed with available operators and indicators (no intrabar timing logic supported); (3) operator '+' (addition) is not in ALLOWED_OPERATORS list—the rule needs to express 'low + range' as an entry price level which requires arithmetic not supported by the schema
translation_notes: This signal requires intraday timing logic ('after first hour') and custom arithmetic (low + average range) that fall outside the backtest engine's capability. The closest approximation would use ATR_14 as a volatility measure, but without time-based filtering and arithmetic operators, the signal cannot be faithfully translated. Recommend implementing custom entry logic or upgrading engine to support intrabar conditions and arithmetic expressions.
